seoTitle: Castle Hill vs Castlecrag — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Castle Hill and Castlecrag. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Castle Hill vs Castlecrag: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Castle Hill and Castlecrag.
heading: Castle Hill vs Castlecrag — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Castle Hill, New South Wales and Castlecrag, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Castlecrag has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Castle Hill (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Castle Hill or Castlecrag safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Castle Hill has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Castlecrag scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Castle Hill scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Castlecrag scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Castle Hill or Castlecrag?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Castlecrag has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
